title: Insurance Brokerage Market to Attain USD 562B by 2031 with Retail Brokerage Holding Over 75% Revenue, Says a 2026 Mordor Intelligence Report
author: Mordor Intelligence
description: The global insurance brokerage market is projected to grow from USD 328.47 billion in 2025 to USD 562.48 billion by 2031, expanding at a 9.38% CAGR. Growth is driven by rising demand for cyber insurance, life insurance in emerging markets, digital adoption, and regulatory compliance needs. North America remains dominant while Asia-Pacific emerges as the fastest-growing region.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Major player in expanding insurance brokerage market with tailwinds from cyber insurance demand, digital adoption, and compliance advisory services growth
Key market participant positioned to benefit from market expansion to USD 562B by 2031 and growing demand for specialty insurance solutions
Major brokerage firm well-positioned in growing market with favorable trends in cyber insurance, embedded insurance, and digital platform adoption
Leading insurance brokerage company benefiting from market growth drivers including digital transformation, regulatory compliance demand, and Asia-Pacific expansion
Major player in expanding brokerage market with opportunities from cyber insurance placement, digital investments, and advisory service expansion

title: Marsh McLennan And Bloomberg Unite To Guide Businesses Through Global Turbulence
author: Triveni Kothapalli
description: Marsh McLennan has formed a strategic partnership with Bloomberg Media to provide insights for global business leaders on managing risks like geopolitical tensions, supply chain disruptions, and climate change, marking the first media initiative under their new unified brand.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is expanding its global influence through strategic media partnership, showcasing expertise in risk management and positioning itself as a thought leader in navigating complex business challenges

title: US Stocks Futures Trade Mixed Ahead Of Opening Bell: 'Preserve Capital In Conditions Of High Uncertainty,' Says Expert
author: Rishabh Mishra
description: US stock futures were volatile ahead of the market open, with experts advising investors to focus on capital preservation due to high uncertainty. The article discusses concerns over liquidity issues in the US banking system and the impact of tariffs on the markets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that Apple saw significant drops in its stock price along with other tech giants like Tesla and Amazon.

title: UPDATE – ClimateTech Connect to Unite Global Leaders in Washington DC for Climate Resilience and Innovation
author: Girish Jaggi
description: ClimateTech Connect, a global conference focused on climate resilience through technology, is coming to Washington DC in April 2025. The event will bring together thought leaders, innovators, policymakers, and industry experts to explore the intersection of climate resilience strategies and technology.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Marsh McLennan is part of the ClimateTech Connect Advisory Council, indicating their involvement and commitment to addressing climate resilience through technology.
